name: BizAPI Company
description: A business entity record returned by the BizAPI Business Intelligence API, containing firmographic data including identification numbers, industry codes, address, contact information, financial indicators, and corporate hierarchy details.

duns_number.description: DUNS number uniquely identifying the business entity.

naics_code_6.description: 6-digit North American Industry Classification System code.

street.description: Street address of the business location.

state.description: State or province of the business location.

zip.description: ZIP or postal code of the business location.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the business location.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the business location.

top_contact_name.description: Name of the top contact at the company.

top_contact_title.description: Title of the top contact at the company.

employees_on_site.description: Number of employees at this location.

parent_duns.description: DUNS number of the parent company.

domestic_ultimate_duns.description: DUNS number of the domestic ultimate parent.

domestic_ultimate_name.description: Name of the domestic ultimate parent.

global_ultimate_duns.description: DUNS number of the global ultimate parent.

global_ultimate_name.description: Name of the global ultimate parent.

family_member_count.description: Number of family members in the corporate hierarchy.
